summary: Iteration 3 scope: pure design iteration — document all 8 existing screen flows (~30 screens) in pencil-new.pen, define 4 design token variables (primary orange #f98c1f, dark background #0D0D0D, Space Grotesk font, 8px border radius), design SOAT upload multi-step flow (6 states + 4 badge variants), export screenshots, and produce docs/handoffs/design.md handoff. No Flutter code changes. No backend changes. Hard gate for Iteration 3b SOAT UI frontend work.
